entries.name: Earth Elemental

traits.name: Crushing Fist
traits.effect: Slams enemy with overwhelming force, staggering target briefly.

traits.name: Wardstone Core
traits.effect: Raises defenses or maximum health temporarily.

entries.description: A living mass of rock and soil animated by the Plane of Earth.

traits.name: Crushing Fist

traits.name: Massive Stomp

traits.effect: Summons a blistering storm of sand that damages and blinds any enemies in the area.

traits.name: Quake Stomp

traits.effect: Launches empowered crystal fragments.

entries.description: Freed of any sigil, it follows only tectonic instinct.

entries.name: Earth Revenant

traits.name: Elemental Grasp
traits.effect: Elemental hands seize multiple targets in place, preventing movement.

traits.effect: Stone plates interlock, reducing incoming harm.

entries.description: A hardened echo of ancient stone will.

entries.name: Earth Ascendant

traits.name: Abyssal Wrath
traits.effect: A brutal hammering with high-pressure force, dealing direct damage.

traits.name: Obsidian Plates
traits.effect: Basalt plates or ember-shields blunt incoming harm.

entries.description: A paragon of the Earth Plane, will layered like strata.

entries.name: Earth Spirit

traits.name: Ward Script
traits.effect: Enables sight of trespassers stepping through wards.

traits.name: Burrow
traits.effect: Entity burrows underground, enabling them to Reemerge at any location.

traits.effect: Burrowed targets reemerge, knocking enemies off-balance or knocking them down.

entries.description: A gentler geomancy that steadies allies.

traits.name: Wild Conflagration
traits.effect: Erupts a tongue of flame at range, dealing damage to all nearby enemies.

traits.effect: Ignites the floor into a hazard that harms those who linger.

traits.name: Flame Lash
traits.effect: Sears the target with a burning strike, dealing direct damage.

traits.effect: A brutal hammering with high-pressure force, dealing direct damage.

entries.description: A knot of void energy coalesced into motion.

traits.name: Void Curse

traits.effect: Projects an umbral surge at range, dealing damage.

entries.description: A prince of emptiness whose will dims the world.

entries.name: Neptulon, the Tide Hunter

traits.name: Deep Stride
traits.effect: Moves swiftly through aquatic terrain.

traits.name: Undertow
traits.effect: Pulls enemies down with crushing water currents.

traits.name: Aquatic Assault
traits.effect: Charge at the enemy underwater, gaining +1 damage upon successful hit dealing direct damage.

traits.name: Water Bolt
traits.effect: Deals damage and knocks foes off balance.

entries.description: Elemental Lord of water, Neptulon was once imprisoned within the Abyssal Maw by the Titans and their keepers after having been banished during the war against the Black Empire. Now free, he is a fierce defender of the seas who refuses to bow to any tyrant, native to Azeroth or otherwise. Though he shares common goals with the defenders of Azeroth, he is not one to suffer trifling beings.

entries.name: Ragnaros, the Fire Lord

traits.name: Fire Blast
traits.effect: Instantly burns enemy target heavily.

traits.name: Elemental Grasp
traits.effect: Vines seize multiple targets in place, preventing movement.

traits.name: Firestorm
traits.effect: Unleashes waves of flame.

traits.name: Flame Crash
traits.effect: Ignites the ground into a hazard that harms those who linger.

entries.description: The fury-bound Elemental Lord of fire, he has tried time and again to assert dominance over his rivals and all of Azeroth at large. Having made multiple incurisons into the material plane, repeatedly escaping his prison within the Firelands, he is responsible for much of the destruction seen across Azeroth during the Cataclysm.

entries.name: Therazane, the Stonemother

traits.name: Stomp
traits.effect: Instantly damages all enemies in a radius.

traits.name: Elemental Surge
traits.effect: Unleashes a strong blast of raw elemental energy.

traits.name: Crude Smash
traits.effect: Heavy melee strike with improvised weapon.

traits.name: Slow
traits.effect: Reduces movement speed.

entries.description: The steadfast Elemental Lord whose dominion in Deepholme serves as the seat of her rule over the earth. One of the more reclusive Elemental Lords, Therazane and her minions often have been forced into choosing sides during planet-wide conflicts with the war against the Black Empire, Deathwing, the Legion, and other times as well.

entries.name: Al'akir, the Wind Lord

traits.name: Slow
traits.effect: Reduces movement speed.

traits.name: Whirlwind Gust
traits.effect: Pushes enemies back with storm winds.

traits.name: Wind Slash
traits.effect: Knocks enemy back briefly, staggering them.

traits.name: Wind’s Wrath
traits.effect: Knocks back enemies with gale force.

entries.description: Perhaps only slightly less ambitious than Ragnaros, Al'akir has pursued his own aims since time immemorial on Azeroth, and time and time until his demise sided with the most aggressive and domineering of masters.
